title: Comprehensive Variable Cascade Example
description: A 'Master Example' showcasing all aspects of the Variable Cascade: internal chaining, external authority mapping (DDI, Croissant, Schema.org), and the hierarchy of Unit Type, Universe, and Population.

REPRESENTED_EMPLOYMENT_BINARY.title: Represented: Active/Inactive Binary
REPRESENTED_EMPLOYMENT_BINARY.description: A shared coding scheme for employment status.
REPRESENTED_EMPLOYMENT_BINARY.fair:universe: Adult human beings of working age

q1_age.title: Age (External DDI Instance)
q1_age.description: Full formal mapping where a dataset-specific variable points to an external registry.
q1_age.$comment: Tools find 'Person' (Unit Type) and 'General Pop' (Universe) by traversing the external URI.

q2_employment.title: Employment (Internal Pure Cascade)
q2_employment.description: Lineage built entirely within the schema using internal references.

q3_satisfaction.title: Satisfaction (MLCommons Croissant)
q3_satisfaction.description: Mapping to a Croissant 'Field' definition (treated as an Instance level definition).
q3_satisfaction.fair:label: Overall life satisfaction

q5_voter_status.title: Voter Status (Standalone Annotation)
q5_voter_status.description: No variable record; just flat annotations for population and phenomenon.
